# JSContextGroupRelease(_:)

**Function**

Releases a JavaScript context group.

## Declaration

```swift
func JSContextGroupRelease(_ group: JSContextGroupRef!)
```

## Parameters

- **group**: The [doc://com.apple.javascriptcore/documentation/JavaScriptCore/JSContextGroupRef] to release.

## Creating a Context Group

- **JSContextGroupCreate()**: Creates a JavaScript context group.
- **JSContextGroupRetain(_:)**: Retains a JavaScript context group.
